nasb.text: He who has a crooked mind finds no good, And he who is perverted in his language falls into evil.

esv.text: A man of crooked heart does not discover good, and one with a dishonest tongue falls into calamity.

cnv.text: 心存欺詐的得不著益處； 舌頭搬弄是非的必陷在禍患中。

ccb.text: 心术不正，难觅幸福； 口吐谎言，陷入祸患。

csbs.text: 心里歪邪的，找不到福份； 话语善变的，陷在恶事中。
